creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Sat Feb 23 00:11:20 2013
New Revision: 312794
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312794

Log:
  - update to 20130129, (GH commit, d9bbeb3)
  - add in patch (submitted upstream) for FreeBSD specific issue
  - while here drop default variable of GH_PROJECT
  
  PR:		175789
  Submitted by:	maintainer, fmb@onibox.net

Added:
  head/devel/ruby-build/files/
  head/devel/ruby-build/files/patch-bin__rbenv-install   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/ruby-build/Makefile
  head/devel/ruby-build/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/ruby-build/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/ruby-build/Makefile	Fri Feb 22 23:49:44 2013	(r312793)
+++ head/devel/ruby-build/Makefile	Sat Feb 23 00:11:20 2013	(r312794)
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ruby-build
-PORTVERSION=	20130104
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	20130129
 CATEGORIES=	devel ruby
 MASTER_SITES=	GH
 
@@ -30,8 +29,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS+=	rbenv:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rb
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	sstephenson
-GH_PROJECT=	${PORTNAME}
-GH_COMMIT=	9ef0e06
+GH_COMMIT=	d9bbeb3
 GH_TAGNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
@@ -41,9 +39,6 @@ PLIST_FILES=	bin/ruby-build \
 		libexec/rbenv-uninstall
 PORTDATA=	*
 
-post-patch-script:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|make |gmake |' \
-		${WRKSRC}/bin/ruby-build
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/ruby-build ${PREFIX}/bin
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/bin/rbenv-install ${PREFIX}/libexec

Modified: head/devel/ruby-build/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/ruby-build/distinfo	Fri Feb 22 23:49:44 2013	(r312793)
+++ head/devel/ruby-build/distinfo	Sat Feb 23 00:11:20 2013	(r312794)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ruby-build-20130104.tar.gz) = ae54c9eb8e61d6ccbb33a9702d4e391f105769007a818c8be3dafad38c5d9240
-SIZE (ruby-build-20130104.tar.gz) = 17478
+SHA256 (ruby-build-20130129.tar.gz) = 148a04c91b855f9d3c024b82fd14903c1d79157ea96a1a68047620872fc4afc5
+SIZE (ruby-build-20130129.tar.gz) = 18436

Added: head/devel/ruby-build/files/patch-bin__rbenv-install
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/ruby-build/files/patch-bin__rbenv-install	Sat Feb 23 00:11:20 2013	(r312794)
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+--- ./bin/rbenv-install.orig	2013-02-18 22:12:22.000000000 -0800
++++ ./bin/rbenv-install	2013-02-18 22:16:04.000000000 -0800
+@@ -28,6 +28,10 @@
+   RBENV_ROOT="${HOME}/.rbenv"
+ fi
+ 
++if [ `uname -s` = "FreeBSD" ]; then
++  export MAKE="gmake"
++fi
++
+ # Load shared library functions
+ eval "$(ruby-build --lib)"
_______________________________________________
